No exact-name match for 宝利 or 宝利 桃華 was found in the HPA 2015 PDF text extraction. Existing candidate remains unresolved.
No exact-name match for 北村 妙美 was found in the HPA 2015 PDF text extraction. Lot 56/Lot 89 duplicate-risk remains unresolved.
